blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 489 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
